case_title: KATHRYN A. DOANE et al VS. LINDA S. DOANE

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RE: ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOANE, KATHRYN A.
REQUEST AND DECLARATION TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY DEFENDANT DOANE, LINDA S.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT APPEARED THROUGH COURT CALL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOANE, KATHRYN A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOANE, LINDA S. $5,994.59 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,994.59, PLAINTIFF JULIA M. ALTAFI'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
